pairs.source_chunk:
RAG Evaluation Benchmarking Tool

This tool evaluates Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines using
LLM-as-a-Judge methodology. It supports four evaluation metrics:
faithfulness, answer relevance, context precision, and correctness.

The system uses Google Gemini as both the RAG model and the evaluation
judge. ChromaDB is used as the vector store for document storage.
All-MiniLM-L6-v2 is the default embedding model.
pairs.question: Which specific components are used for the vector store and embedding model in the RAG Evaluation Benchmarking Tool?
pairs.ground_truth_answer: The tool uses ChromaDB as the vector store and All-MiniLM-L6-v2 as the default embedding model.
pairs.generated_answer: According to smoke_test.txt, ChromaDB is used as the vector store, and All-MiniLM-L6-v2 is the default embedding model.
